issue: Cache key is (email, exchange, ik). If two callers share an email (corporate / staging vs prod) and reuse the same IK with DIFFERENT api_keys, the cached response from one is served to the other. Include hash(api_key) in the cache key.
Both caches are in-process; multi-worker deployment lets an attacker rotate through workers to bypass throttle. Documented in comment but worth a follow-up issue or Redis migration note.
